# Ikigai Sailing

> Ikigai Sailing ASD is a non-profit amateur sailing association (recognized by CONI, affiliated with MSP Italia) running mindful sailing trips aboard the Catana 47 catamaran "Ikigai" in San Blas (Guna Yala), Panama, and across the Pacific. Trips combine freediving, yoga, meditation, Janzu and slow ocean travel. Bookings are direct with the crew; payments are member contributions, not commercial charter fees.

Contact: WhatsApp +39 331 32 926 29 · Instagram @ikigaisailing_asd

## Boarding options
- [Ikigai Experience](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/trips/ikigai-experience/): Ten days aboard Ikigai in San Blas — a concentrate of authentic, essential and regenerating life: freediving, yoga, slow sailing and transformative practices with our multidisciplinary instructors. (from €300)
- [10 days on board Ikigai](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/trips/10-days-on-board/): In 10 days, we will guide you through powerful and transformative practices. This retreat is unique thanks to our multidisciplinary instructors (from €3000)
- [One month aboard](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/trips/one-month/): Live like a true sailor for a month aboard Ikigai (with the option to split into two two-week embarkations). Engage fully in life on board, ... (from €2000)
- [Ocean Pacific Crossing](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/trips/pacific-crossing/): Pacific Crossing, Join us on a once-in-a-lifetime adventure across the Pacific Ocean! 4,000 nautical miles from Panama to the Marquesas Islands (from €2000)
- [Exchange / Paid Boarding](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/trips/crew-exchange/): Join the Ikigai crew in San Blas: volunteer or trade professional skills for boarding aboard our Catana 47 — live sailing, freediving and ocean life as a true protagonist.

## Activities aboard
- [Yoga Retreat](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/activities/yoga/): With the sea as a backdrop and the sound of the waves, your yoga retreat becomes a transformative practice. Each session is designed to...
- [FreeDiving](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/activities/freediving/): Freediving is not just a sport—it can be a true path to self-discovery, a chance to pause, breathe, and listen to yourself.
- [Meditation](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/activities/meditation/): Meditation with Ikigai Sailing is a unique experience, where the tranquility of the sea amplifies the benefits of the practice.
- [Janzu](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/activities/janzu/): Janzu is an experience of deep relaxation and connection with the aquatic element. Gentle and fluid movements, help you release stress
- [KiteSurf](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/activities/kitesurf/): Kitesurfing is much more than a sport: it is a true celebration of freedom, energy, and a deep connection with nature.
- [Diving](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/activities/diving/): With diving, every immersion is a journey through vibrant colors, marine life, and sunken mysteries. Descend into the depths...

## Key pages
- [The Route](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/route/): where Ikigai is sailing now and next
- [Catana 47](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/catana-47/): the boat
- [Season 2025/26 San Blas](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/season-2025-26/): the main season
- [Reviews](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/reviews/): guest testimonials
- [Contact](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/contact/): book direct

## Recent writing
- [Personal growth retreats: what to look for (and what to avoid)](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/blog/personal-growth-retreats-what-to-look-for-and-what-to-avoid/): Searching for personal growth retreats? Avoid new age clichés and rigid wellness resorts. Discover the power of an authentic embodied
- [Mindful Eating on the Move | Sailing Retreat Experience](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/blog/mindful-eating-and-sailing-retreats-why-it-really-matters-when-traveling/): Discover why mindful eating during travel transforms body and mind. Experience a true embodied sailing retreat with Ikigai Sailing
- [Sailing and Freediving Holiday: Beyond the Resort](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/blog/catamaran-retreat-vs-wellness-resort/): Catamaran retreat vs Resort: discover the Ikigai Sailing "Embodied Experience". Sport, freediving and nature to reset your nervous system
- [Silence, wind and rhythm: why choose regenerative sailing](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/blog/how-sailing-supports-nervous-system-regulation-and-mindfulness/): Find your balance with Ikigai Sailing. Discover how the rhythm of the wind and the sea regenerates your nervous system
- [Ikigai: Origins, Meaning, and Practical Application in Modern Life](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/blog/ikigai-origins-meaning-and-practical-application-in-modern-life/): Discover the true meaning of Ikigai with Ikigai Sailing. A hands-on experience between sea and wind to rediscover your natural balance.
- [Ikigai and Travel: How to Rediscover Your Natural Rhythm at Sea](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/blog/ikigai-and-travel-how-to-rediscover-your-natural-rhythm-at-sea/): Find your Ikigai between wind and sea. With Ikigai Sailing, rediscover your natural rhythm through sailing and a unique sensory experience.
- [How Movement and Sailing Support Personal Growth](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/blog/how-movement-and-sailing-support-personal-growth/): Discover how sailing and movement regenerate the nervous system. An embodied mindfulness experience to grow beyond traditional retreats.
- [Mindful travel: travel with intention](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/blog/mindful-travel-what-it-really-means-to-travel-with-intention/): An exploration of mindful travel and what it truly means to travel with intention. An experiential story about conscious sailing.
- [Mindfulness and Nervous System Reset](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/blog/why-the-sea-is-a-powerful-tool-for-mindfulness-and-nervous-system-reset/): Discover how the sea supports nervous system reset, embodied mindfulness, and inner clarity. A deep mind–body reset with Ikigai Sailing.
- [What is an Ikigai vacation and why it’s not just another holiday](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/blog/what-is-an-ikigai-vacation-and-why-its-not-just-another-holiday/): What an Ikigai vacation really is, and why it’s not just another holiday — something subtler and deeper: not a goal to reach, but a way of travelling.
- [Why sailing is an important tool for personal growth](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/blog/why-sailing-is-one-of-the-most-powerful-tools-for-personal-growth/): Sailing is a powerful tool for personal growth. Some experiences don’t need much explanation — you feel them.
- [How we turn sea water into drinkable water aboard Ikigai Sailing](https://www.ikigaisailing.com/blog/how-we-turn-sea-water-into-drinkable-even-sparkling-water-aboard-ikigai/): Discover how Ikigai Sailing transforms sea water into drinkable and sparkling water, living off-grid and minimizing environmental impact.
